chrome_rules_to_preserve: button[type='roll'] { margin: 0; cursor: pointer; &:hover { color: red; } }
notes: All wh40k-control-button and wh40k-control-button__span references ported to inline Tailwind utilities (tw-cursor-pointer, hover:tw-opacity-100, tw-pt-[3px], tw-pl-[2px], tw-inline-grid, tw-opacity-50). The item-edit JS hook class was preserved alongside Tailwind utilities on item-table-row.hbs line 57. The wh40k-material, wh40k-trait-toggle, and wh40k-vocalise classes from the _controls.css block had no active template references — they were already unused. The button[type=roll] and button.wh40k-material[type=action] chrome rules are attribute-selector rules; they cannot be ported to inline Tailwind. They must be moved to src/css/foundry-chrome.css before the block is deleted from the monolith.
